channel.title: Chris Hohn — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED GE (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added GE in Q4 2025 · 18.2% of portfolio. Building the aerospace/defense position further.

item.title: Chris Hohn: TRIMMED META (-6%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) trimmed META in Q4 2025 · 8.2% of portfolio. Small META profit-taking.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED META (+47%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added META in Q3 2025 · 5.8% of portfolio. TCI massively adding META — biggest move of the quarter.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED V (+47%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added V (VISA INC) in Q3 2025 · 20.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: TRIMMED MSFT (-6%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) trimmed MSFT (MICROSOFT CORP) in Q3 2025 · 18.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: TRIMMED GOOG (-41%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) trimmed GOOG (ALPHABET INC) in Q3 2025 · 3.9% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: EXITED GOOGL (-100%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) exited GOOGL (ALPHABET INC) in Q3 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED META (+30%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added META in Q2 2025 · 4.2% of portfolio. First major META add — 3 Q consecutive building.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED GE (+8%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added GE in Q2 2025 · 17.4% of portfolio. Building GE Aerospace.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED V (+15%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added V (VISA INC) in Q2 2025 · 15.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: TRIMMED GOOG (-6%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) trimmed GOOG (ALPHABET INC) in Q2 2025 · 5.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: TRIMMED GOOGL (-23%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) trimmed GOOGL (ALPHABET INC) in Q2 2025 · 1.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: NEW POSITION META · Q1 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) new position META in Q1 2025 · 3.2% of portfolio. TCI first entered META here.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED MSFT (+24%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added MSFT (MICROSOFT CORP) in Q1 2025 · 17.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: TRIMMED GOOG (-16%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) trimmed GOOG (ALPHABET INC) in Q1 2025 · 5.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: TRIMMED GOOGL (-32%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) trimmed GOOGL (ALPHABET INC) in Q1 2025 · 1.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED META (+38%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added META in Q4 2024 · 3.5% of portfolio. TCI accelerating META build.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED GE (+10%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added GE in Q4 2024 · 17.5% of portfolio. Building GE Aerospace.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED MSFT (+17%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added MSFT (MICROSOFT CORP) in Q4 2024 · 15.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED META (+28%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added META in Q3 2024 · 2.7% of portfolio. TCI building META.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED GE (+12%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added GE in Q3 2024 · 16.0% of portfolio. GE Aerospace add.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED MSFT (+14%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added MSFT (MICROSOFT CORP) in Q3 2024 · 13.4% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: NEW POSITION META · Q2 2024
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) new position META in Q2 2024 · 2.0% of portfolio. TCI's first META position.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED GE (+10%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added GE in Q2 2024 · 14.5% of portfolio. GE Aerospace build.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED MCO (+9%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added MCO (MOODYS CORP) in Q2 2024 · 15.4% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED GOOGL (+398%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added GOOGL (ALPHABET INC) in Q2 2024 · 3.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Chris Hohn: ADDED GE (+6%) · Q1 2024
item.description: Chris Hohn (TCI Fund Management) added GE in Q1 2024 · 13.5% of portfolio. GE Aerospace early add.
